items.title: Today, we share a breakthrough on the planar unit distance problem, a famous open question first pos...
items.summary: Today, we share a breakthrough on the planar unit distance problem, a famous open question first posed by Paul ErdЕ‘s in 1946. For nearly 80 years, mathematicians believed the best possible solutions looked roughly like square grids. An OpenAI model has now disproved that belief,вҖҰ

items.title: The proof came from a general-purpose reasoning model, not a system built specifically to solve math...
items.summary: The proof came from a general-purpose reasoning model, not a system built specifically to solve math problems or this problem in particular, and represents an important milestone for the math and AI communities. openai.com/index/model-diвҖҰрҹ’¬46рҹ”„225вқӨпёҸ2766рҹ‘Җ1236193рҹ“Ҡ401вҡЎ Powered by xgo.вҖҰ
